title: Star Trek: Conquest
short_description: A turn-based galactic strategy game set in the Next Generation era, where six races battle for control of the galaxy.
description: Star Trek: Conquest is a 2007 strategy game developed by 4J Studios and published by Bethesda Softworks for PlayStation 2 and Wii. Set in the Star Trek: The Next Generation era during the Dominion War, players choose from six races — Federation, Klingon, Romulan, Breen, Cardassian, and Dominion — and fight for galactic supremacy by capturing enemy homeworlds. Each turn allows players to purchase ships and facilities, advance Admirals through experience ranks, and engage in real-time space combat when fleets clash. Directed by 4J co-founder Frank Arnot.
